_meta.what: prototype-arg attributes per trigger (and load): required = participates without use_<name>; multiEntry = value/operator are ARRAYS; init='arg' = event payload; enable = gated by another field (functions carried verbatim). From the RAW event_prototypes dump - the attributes build_index's flattener dropped.

Cast.name: duration
Cast.init: endTime and startTime and (endTime - startTime)/1000 or 0

Character Stats.name: avoidancetotalpercent
Character Stats.init: 0.04 * ( UnitDefense('player') + select(2,UnitDefense('player') ) - UnitLevel('player')*5 ) + GetDodgeChance() + GetParryChance() + GetBlockChance()

Item Count.name: name
Item Count.init: itemName and itemName ~= '' and GetItemInfo(itemName) or itemName

Pet Behavior.name: behavior
Pet Behavior.test: UnitExists('pet') and (not check_behavior or (inverse and check_behavior ~= behavior) or (not inverse and check_behavior == behavior))
